mapper.select: SELECT * FROM household_member WHERE household_id = #{householdId} AND member_status = 'CURRENT' ORDER BY member_id FOR UPDATE
mapper.update:
UPDATE household_member SET member_status = #{status}, leave_date = #{leaveDate}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE member_id IN
#{id}
UPDATE household_member SET member_status = 'LEFT', leave_date = #{leaveDate}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE person_id = #{personId} AND member_status = 'CURRENT'
UPDATE household_member SET member_status = 'CANCELLED', leave_date = #{leaveDate}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE person_id = #{personId} AND member_status = 'CURRENT'
